docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2012 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,362.00 FILED BY TORKAMAN, AMIR AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, ROBERT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2012 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, ROBERT

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORKAMAN, AMIR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALES, ROBERT $401.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $401.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
